content.json:
# Harness Quality Workbook

Cross-run quality view for the agent-delivery-harness, keyed on customDimensions['harness.version']. Every panel scopes time via the {TimeRange} parameter. Panels read the App Insights table that matches the exporter span mapping: tool/lifecycle spans to dependencies, agent/model spans to customEvents. See docs/evaluation/dashboards/README.md for the panel to contract-field map and honest-metric caveats.

content.query: dependencies | where {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), outcome = tostring(customDimensions['harness.outcome']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']) | where step == 'finish' | summarize passed = countif(outcome == 'pass'), runs = count() by hv | extend pass_rate = todouble(passed) / todouble(runs) | project hv, runs, passed, pass_rate | order by hv asc
content.title: Outcome / pass rate by harness.version

content.query: dependencies | where {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), feature = tostring(customDimensions['harness.feature_id']) | where step in ('green_handback', 'red_handback') | summarize greens = countif(step == 'green_handback'), reds_after = countif(step == 'red_handback') by hv, feature | summarize free = countif(greens > 0 and reds_after == 0), of = count() by hv | extend red_reentry_free_rate = todouble(free) / todouble(of) | project hv, free, of, red_reentry_free_rate | order by hv asc
content.title: red_reentry_free_rate by harness.version

content.query: dependencies | where {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), feature = tostring(customDimensions['harness.feature_id']) | where step == 'deviation' | summarize deviations = count(), features = dcount(feature) by hv | order by hv asc
content.title: Deviation rate by harness.version

content.query: dependencies | where {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), tool = tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.tool.name']), status = tostring(customDimensions['harness.exit_status']) | where isnotempty(tool) | summarize calls = count(), fail_calls = countif(status != '0' and isnotempty(status)) by hv, tool | order by calls desc
content.title: Tool-call volume (dependencies)

content.query: dependencies | where {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), skill = tostring(customDimensions['harness.skill.name']), outcome = tostring(customDimensions['harness.outcome']) | where isnotempty(skill) | summarize calls = count(), fail_calls = countif(outcome == 'fail') by hv, skill | order by calls desc
content.title: Skill-invocation volume (harness.skill.name)

content.query: dependencies | where {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), dur = todouble(customDimensions['harness.duration_ms']) | where isnotempty(step) and isnotnull(dur) | summarize wall_clock_ms = sum(dur) by hv, step | order by wall_clock_ms desc
content.title: Wall-clock per lifecycle_step (dependencies duration)

content.query: customEvents | where {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), model = tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.request.model']) | extend input_tokens = toreal(measurements['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), output_tokens = toreal(measurements['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) | summarize input_tokens = sum(input_tokens), output_tokens = sum(output_tokens), runs_with_tokens = countif(isnotnull(input_tokens)), runs = count() by hv, model | extend tokens_status = iff(runs_with_tokens == 0, 'unavailable-until-issue-96', 'measured') | order by hv asc
content.title: Token / cost (customEvents measurements) - unavailable until #96

content.query: dependencies | where {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), mode = tostring(customDimensions['harness.failure_mode']), outcome = tostring(customDimensions['harness.outcome']) | where outcome == 'fail' and isnotempty(mode) | summarize failures = count() by hv, mode | order by failures desc
content.title: Failure-mode view (harness.failure_mode)

content.json:
## Deferred metrics - explicitly UNAVAILABLE

The following contract-deferred metrics are NOT charted because trace-summary.v1.json does not carry them. They are shown here as explicitly unavailable / deferred / n/a, never fabricated:

- Review-blocking findings per issue: DEFERRED / unavailable / n/a - trace-summary v1 carries no per-verdict field (per-stage handback counts are only a labeled proxy). Needs an additive trace-summary v1.x extension.
- Per-feature attribution of tool calls: DEFERRED / unavailable / n/a - v1 tools[] has no feature dimension. Needs an additive trace-summary v1.x extension.

The red_reentry_free_rate panel above measures no-red-after-green re-entry. The token/cost panel is likewise unavailable-until-#96 and renders an honest null (never a fabricated 0) when no run carried gen_ai.usage.* numbers.
